message:
fix: resolve 5 clippy lints in frankenterm binary crate

Box RestoreSummary in RestartWorkflowResult::Restored to fix large_enum_variant,
replace needless collect+len with count in 3 distributed pane assertions,
and use Path::extension for case-insensitive .bak file matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
